name: Future Money Acquisition Corp
business: Future Money Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more target businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not engaged in substantive discussions with any target. The company intends to focus on acquiring a business in the AI, Web3, or intelligent manufacturing industries.

exposures.sentence: In AI, opportunities include enterprise automation, agent-based systems, digital infrastructure, and vertical-specific AI applications that improve productivity and decision-making.

In Web3, opportunities include decentralized data infrastructure, blockchain-enabled enterprise solutions, tokenization technologies, digital identity and next-generation payment and settlement systems.

In intelligent manufacturing, opportunities include automation hardware, robotics, advanced sensors, industrial IoT systems, computer-vision-enabled quality control, and next-generation production technologies that improve cost efficiency, throughput and resilience.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination (18 months from closing of offering, extendable up to 6 months)
catalysts.sentence: We will have up to 18 months to consummate an initial business combination from the closing of this offering, which period may be extended for up to six one-month extensions beyond the initial 18 months from the closing of this offering, subject to our sponsor depositing into the trust account for each one-month extension, $330,000, or up to $379,500 if the underwriters over-allotment option is exercised in full (representing $0.0330 per share of the total units sold in this offering), for an aggregate of $1,980,000 (or $2,277,000 if the underwriters over-allotment option is exercised in full) if we extend for the full six months).
